tool_args.label: Madison Avenue 2019 project has the Madison Avenue double bus lane treatment

payload.description: The 2019 project upgrades the existing Madison Avenue double bus lanes with red paint and signage.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 03 Madison Ave, 60th St to 42nd St

The double bus lanes on Madison Ave are part of the busiest bus corridor in the city. Worn markings and lack of red paint have made the lanes difficult to interpret. This project continues 2018 work to upgrade the bus lanes to red-painted lanes.
